name: Roof Anchor Point
shortDescription: Permanent stainless steel anchor for roof and structural fall-arrest use.
longDescription: A fixed anchor point gives a permanent, engineered connection for fall-arrest systems on roofs, steel structures and tank tops, removing the guesswork of finding a suitably rated tie-off point on site. Supplied in stainless steel for weather resistance, with a mounting template for correct installation.

images.alt: Roof Anchor Point supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
